title: Software Development Roles & Career Path - Planned | Skill-Wanderer
description: Explore software development career paths and roles. Learn about different tech careers, progression paths, job search strategies, and how to navigate your tech career journey.
plainText:
Software Development Roles & Career Path Navigate Your Tech Career Journey Understand the landscape of software development careers. Explore different roles, career progressions, industry expectations, and find the path that aligns with your goals and passions. 🎯 6 Comprehensive Courses 🔜 Coming Soon 📝 Curriculum Subject to Change 🧭 Path Planned We're planning a comprehensive career guidance curriculum that will help you understand the software development industry, explore various roles, and chart your career path. This path is in the planning phase and development will begin soon. Courses in This Path: 🗺️ Industry Overview Understanding the tech industry, company types, startup vs enterprise, market trends, and career progression paths 📊 Strategy and Planning Product Manager, Project Manager, Business Analyst, Scrum Master, and technical leadership roles 🎨 Design and User Experience UI/UX Designer, Product Designer, Interaction Designer, UX Researcher, and Design Systems roles 💻 Core Development and Engineering Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack, Mobile, Game Developer, Data Engineer, and ML/AI Engineer roles 🔒 Quality and Security QA Engineer, SDET, Security Engineer, Penetration Tester, and Compliance Specialist roles ⚙️ Infrastructure and Operations DevOps Engineer, SRE, Cloud Architect, Platform Engineer, and System Administrator roles Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the Software Development Roles & Career path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path
